description: T-sequences: four (0,±1) sequences with zero-sum non-periodic autocorrelation and disjoint support. Combined with Williamson-type matrices via Cooper-Wallis theorem to produce Hadamard matrices. For H(668), need T-sequences of length 167.
mathematical_formalization: sum_i N_{A_i}(j) = 0 for j >= 1, supp(A_1) ⊔ supp(A_2) ⊔ supp(A_3) ⊔ supp(A_4) = {0,...,166}

key_results.cooper_wallis_needs: T-matrices of order t and Williamson matrices of order w with tw=167
